summary: Tested Solomon AI demo fixes for iteration 88: Watch page dark theme, flat Cafe/Merch nav, aggregate dashboard, saved card checkout flows. All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: Video instructors in database (Pastor James, Pastor Sarah) don't match expected 'Pastor Charles Nieman' per requirements. UI screenshot showed Charles Nieman but API returns different names.

action_items: Update video instructor names in database to 'Pastor Charles Nieman' if that's the requirement
context_for_next_testing_agent: All demo fixes verified working. Watch page has dark Masterclass theme (rgb(0,0,0) background). Portal nav shows flat Cafe/Merch links (no Shop dropdown). Cafe and Merch checkout flows use MultiPaymentSelector with saved Visa ****4242 card pre-selected. Shannon can access All Campuses aggregate view showing 35,331+ total members across 3 campuses (East: 12,847, Downtown: 10,921, West: 11,563). Solomon Pay processor is MOCKED for demo mode.

watch_page_dark_theme.details: Background rgb(0,0,0), .atv-page element present, Masterclass-style dark theme

watch_page_videos.details: 3 videos returned: SO BE IT, Unshakeable Faith, New Beginnings. Note: Instructors in DB are Pastor James/Sarah, not Charles Nieman

flat_cafe_merch_nav.details: Cafe and Merch are individual NavLink items in portal header, no Shop dropdown

cafe_checkout_saved_card.details: MultiPaymentSelector shows Visa ****4242 pre-selected, Complete Order button visible

merch_checkout_saved_card.details: MultiPaymentSelector shows Visa ****4242 pre-selected, Pay with SolomonPay button visible

campus_member_counts.details: Abundant East: 12,847, Abundant Downtown: 10,921, Abundant West: 11,563 - all 10K+

abundant_downtown_name.details: Campus correctly shows as 'Abundant Downtown' not 'Abundant Northeast'

member_saved_payment_method.details: Member demo account has Visa ****4242 saved payment method

solomonpay_process.details: Solomon Pay process endpoint accepts token and returns success (MOCKED demo mode)

mocked_apis.solomon_pay: Solomon Pay processor_adapter uses mock/demo mode - charges always succeed
